Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}No matter how many times I see it, the menu here is still incredibly daunting. I've yet to try everything on it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Mitsuru grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки[n]стануть міцнішими скоро...[n]{f 1 1}
